untranslatable_reason: Signal requires model-level metrics (true positive rate by directional class and asymmetry ratio) that are not available in the standard technical indicator set. These are predictive model performance statistics (down_tpr, up_tpr, asymmetry_ratio) that must be computed externally from a trained classifier and fed into the backtest engine as custom metrics, not derived from price/volume data.
translation_notes: This is a meta-signal that conditions trading on model performance characteristics rather than market microstructure. It requires: (1) A trained directional prediction model with separate TPR calculations for up/down classes, (2) External computation of asymmetry_ratio = down_tpr / up_tpr, (3) Real-time monitoring and retraining checks. The signal cannot be expressed using only standard technical indicators. Implementation requires a custom adapter layer that feeds model performance metrics into the rule engine.
